'''âp-n-m-k''' ('''kapanmekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wott|wott]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wott|wott]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-n-m-k
|-
! Lemma
| kapanmekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipanmekoko|thipanmekoko]] || [[word:jipanmekoko|jipanmekoko]] || [[word:shipanmekoko|shipanmekoko]] || [[word:kipanmekoko|kipanmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupanmekoko|thuthupanmekoko]] || [[word:jujupanmekoko|jujupanmekoko]] || [[word:shushupanmekoko|shushupanmekoko]] || [[word:kukupanmekoko|kukupanmekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopanmekoko|thopanmekoko]] || [[word:jopanmekoko|jopanmekoko]] || [[word:shopanmekoko|shopanmekoko]] || [[word:kopanmekoko|kopanmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚpanmekoko|thĂŚpanmekoko]] || [[word:jĂŚpanmekoko|jĂŚpanmekoko]] || [[word:shĂŚpanmekoko|shĂŚpanmekoko]] || [[word:kĂŚpanmekoko|kĂŚpanmekoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapanmekoko|thapanmekoko]] || [[word:japanmekoko|japanmekoko]] || [[word:shapanmekoko|shapanmekoko]] || [[word:kapanmekoko|kapanmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapanmekoko|thapanmekoko]] || [[word:japanmekoko|japanmekoko]] || [[word:shapanmekoko|shapanmekoko]] || [[word:kapanmekoko|kapanmekoko]]
|}
